Consumer Products Case

Appearance Prototype and Functional Trial Parts for Consumer Products

appearance prototype / functional parts / design verification

IndustriesConsumer Products
Part Functionappearance prototype / functional parts / design verification
Manufacturing CapabilitiesCNC machining, 3D printing coordination, surface finishing and small-batch delivery

Project Scenario

The consumer product project combined appearance mockups with functional trial parts so design and engineering review could happen in parallel.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The delivered parts supported appearance review, assembly feedback and the next round of functional testing.

Consumer Products Manufacturing Capabilities

Continue viewing consumer product manufacturing cases such as wearable housings, appliance brackets and appearance prototypes.
